$comment: Coarse feature tracker for AI agents. GitHub issues remain the source of truth for fine-grained work; this file is the at-a-glance map an agent reads on startup. Keep statuses honest: done | in_progress | planned | out_of_scope. Exactly one feature should be in_progress at a time (see AGENTS.md 'Scope').

features.name: NuGet V3 proxy (MVP)
features.description: Stream package files through and cache metadata in memory for service index, flatcontainer listing, registration, search, and .nupkg GET/HEAD with @id URL rewrite.
features.doneCriteria: All NuGet V3 endpoints in README served; integration tests green via dotnet cake --target=Test.
features.evidence: tests/Heimdall.IntegrationTests + tests/Heimdall.SmokeTests against api.nuget.org pass in release CI.

features.name: minAgeDays filter rule (+ exclude)
features.description: Reject versions younger than N days; null published date is denied. Optional exclude globs bypass the age check for first-party namespaces.
features.doneCriteria: Rule applied in listing and download paths; exclude documented in README; unit tests cover allow/deny/exclude.
features.evidence: CHANGELOG [Unreleased] 'minAgeDays exclude' entry, Closes #2; smoke 'age-locked' feed rejects the anchor version.

features.name: allowDeny filter rule
features.description: Case-insensitive glob allow/deny by package ID; deny wins; allow-list gates non-matching packages.
features.doneCriteria: Listing and download honour allow/deny semantics described in README.
features.evidence: Smoke coverage: allow admits matching/blocks non-matching; deny blocks matching/passes non-matching.

features.name: Filter latest versions
features.description: Filtering rule targeting the most-recent version(s) of a package — see issue #19 for the exact semantics to design.
features.doneCriteria: Rule type implemented with unit + integration tests; README/docs updated; CHANGELOG entry; Closes #19.

features.name: npm registry proxy
features.description: Second ecosystem after NuGet. Mirror the filtering-rule contract over the npm registry API.
features.doneCriteria: npm read-path endpoints proxied with filtering; npm smoke coverage added (currently deferred per CHANGELOG); Closes #11.

features.name: PyPI proxy
features.description: PyPI ecosystem support behind the same rule engine.
features.doneCriteria: PyPI read-path proxied with filtering and tests; Closes #12.

features.name: Go modules proxy
features.doneCriteria: Go module read-path proxied with filtering and tests; Closes #13.

features.name: Maven Central proxy
features.doneCriteria: Maven read-path proxied with filtering and tests; Closes #14.

features.name: Documentation improvements
features.description: Improve the Docusaurus docs under docs/ (source) — config, rules, API, operations, architecture.
features.doneCriteria: Edits land in docs/ (not website/docs/); npm run build passes in website/ (onBrokenLinks: throw); Closes #10.

features.name: L2 Redis cache
features.description: Out of scope for MVP. Contract is in place and registered through DI, but no implementation.
features.doneCriteria: n/a — MVP explicitly excludes this (README 'Out of scope').
